architecture_notes_for_agents: Coolify auto-deploy is OFF — only set-version.yml triggers deploys (on real src/ commits only).
observer-qa.yml MUST be workflow_dispatch ONLY — no push, no pull_request, no paths filter.
Do NOT dispatch a new run if a run is already in_progress or recently concluded — check status first.
Do NOT dispatch if triple-trigger pattern is observed — escalate to Manager.
Middleware runs on Edge runtime — provider-constant.ts is the ONLY safe import for middleware.
next-auth requires trustHost: true behind Traefik.
